meaning: n.询问的人,探究的人,调查者
examples: I write personally to each inquirer.
She read the comics in the Philadelphia Inquirer.
"It's easy to find the poverty," he told the Philadelphia Inquirer.
Chicagotribune.com and The Inquirer (www.philly.com) offer school "report cards" that include scores, demographics and other info.
Finally, the Philadelphia Inquirer gave tips on how to start saving during lean times.
